overall.description: Cinematic end credits sequence from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2, featuring a slideshow of concept art and character portraits with scrolling text. The video displays static images of Space Marines, alien creatures, and gothic sci-fi environments with slow crossfade transitions while credits roll on the right side.

events.description: image crossfades from space marine portrait to skull-hooded chaplain figure
image transitions to corrupted marine portrait with purple mutations
image transitions to large tyranid alien creature with glowing eyes

agents.ego_description: player viewing the end credits sequence

entered.detail: close-up portrait of a Space Marine in blue power armor with serious expression
portrait of a hooded figure wearing a skull mask with red glowing eyes
portrait of a corrupted Space Marine with purple fungal growths on the face
large alien creature with chitinous armor and sharp bone appendages
white text listing development staff names scrolling upward on black background

segments.scene_description: The credits sequence opens with a series of character portraits crossfading every four seconds against a dark background. The sequence displays a Space Marine, a skull-masked chaplain, a mutated marine, and a Tyranid creature while development credits scroll continuously on the right side of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: credits screen displaying environmental concept art

events.description: image transitions to gothic industrial cityscape with flying vessel
image transitions to industrial interior with metal scaffolding
image transitions to desert wasteland with large rock formations

agents.ego_description: player continuing to view the scrolling credits

entered.detail: alien landscape with tall organic spires and red vegetation under green sky
dark gothic cityscape with a large flying vessel hovering above industrial structures
interior view of massive industrial complex with metal walkways and pipes
barren desert landscape with a large curved monumental structure in the distance

segments.scene_description: The credits continue with environmental concept art showing alien landscapes and gothic industrial architecture. Images cycle through an alien spire landscape, a dark city with an aircraft, industrial interiors, and a desert wasteland while the credit scroll progresses.

events.description: scene shifts to warm orange lighting of a burning cityscape
image transitions to industrial dock with large mechanical crane
image transitions to exterior of massive gothic cathedral with spires

entered.detail: dark gothic city with towering spires under a stormy sky
war-torn urban environment with fires burning in the foreground and destroyed buildings
industrial dock with massive mechanical crane and shipping containers near water
exterior of an ornate gothic cathedral with tall pointed spires and arched windows

segments.scene_description: The sequence continues with darker war-themed environments including a burning city with orange firelight, an industrial dock with heavy machinery, and an imposing gothic cathedral exterior. The lighting shifts from cool to warm tones as the scenes progress.

scene_state.functional_zone: credits screen displaying diverse atmospheric locations

events.description: scene shifts to blue hour lighting of a rainy street with a mechanical walker
image transitions to bright ice cave with glowing blue portal
image transitions to alien landscape with floating pyramid structure

entered.detail: interior of a burning gothic building with flames consuming the structure
rainy urban street scene with a large mechanical walker in the background
crystalline ice cave with a bright glowing blue portal or energy field
alien terrain with a massive floating pyramid and electrical storms in the sky

segments.scene_description: The credits showcase diverse atmospheric locations including a burning building interior, a rainy street with a mech walker, a bright ice cave with a portal, and an alien landscape with a floating pyramid. The color palette shifts from warm oranges to cool blues and purples.

scene_state.functional_zone: credits screen displaying characters and battle scenes

events.description: image transitions to battle scene with Space Marine fighting large creature
sequence loops back to the initial space marine portrait
image returns to the mutated marine portrait

agents.ego_description: player viewing the final portion of the credits

entered.detail: character in elaborate dark armor with mechanical details and glowing elements
action scene showing a Space Marine confronting a massive winged daemon creature

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows additional character art and an action battle scene before looping back to the opening portraits. The sequence repeats the Space Marine, skull chaplain, mutated marine, and tyranid images as the credits continue to scroll toward completion.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous visual progression that shifts from intimate character portraits into expansive, war-torn gothic landscapes. It begins with a series of crossfading portraits of Space Marines, a skull-masked chaplain, and a Tyranid creature set against a dark void while credits scroll on the right. As the focus expands, the imagery transitions into environmental concept art, moving from alien spires and dark cities with aircraft into industrial interiors and desert wastelands. The scene then shifts toward darker, war-themed environments, where the lighting transforms from cool tones to the warm, orange glow of a burning city. Finally, the camera glides through an industrial dock with heavy machinery before settling on the imposing exterior of a gothic cathedral.

The shot follows a continuous visual progression through a series of atmospheric gothic sci-fi environments that eventually transition into a cycle of character portraits. It begins within the warm orange glow of a burning building interior, moving through a rainy street featuring a mech walker before shifting into the cool blues of a bright ice cave with a portal. The scene then expands into a surreal alien landscape dominated by a floating pyramid, where the color palette deepens into rich purples. As the environment fades, the focus shifts toward dynamic action battle scenes and detailed character art, finally looping back through a sequence of Space Marines, skull chaplains, and tyranids as the credits reach completion.
